discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹31,425,275, but 5-year family income is only ₹8,907,990. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹22,517,285.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Residential Buildings purchased in 2001 for ₹225,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹846,000) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹8,500,000.
